OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: Call Demo Log Demo Selected

omniProcessElements.name: DRGetWSData
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSUtilGetDemoDataToSendForTracking", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "SelectScenario:ScenarioName", "inputParam" : "Scenario" }, { "element" : "userId", "inputParam" : "userId" }, { "element" : "DemoType", "inputParam" : "DemoType" } ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataRaptorExtractAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: GetAccessToken
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "HTTPAction1", "namedCredential" : "", "postActionLogging" : "", "preActionLogging" : "%endpoint%", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "restMethod" : "POST", "restOptions" : { "clientCertificateName" : "", "headers" : { "Accept" : "*/*", "Content-Length" : 260, "Content-Type" : "application/x-www-form-urlencoded", "Host" : "login.salesforce.com", "User-Agent" : "curl/8.4.0" }, "isCompressed" : false, "params" : { "client_id" : "3MVG9bYGb9rFSjxQsVD0kLCXkxR_e.SY8erxgrskCiqvB6gUoPPjvPY73pWupUzeC4WsKOwjAFEx6OH6SZgt4", "client_secret" : "C85226B25A5E3562F2194015B3BB3B97B961F33FA55A96AC897FB934073EFE8E", "grant_type" : "password", "password" : "Salesforce123", "username" : "jblankenship@psdemologging2024.demo" }, "sendBody" : false, "timeout" : 0, "xmlEscapeResponse" : false }, "restPath" : "https://login.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/token", "retryCount" : 0, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "type" : "Integration", "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: SendToWS
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "HTTPAction2", "namedCredential" : "", "postActionLogging" : "", "preActionLogging" : "%endpoint%", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "restMethod" : "POST", "restOptions" : { "clientCertificateName" : "", "headers" : { "Authorization" : "Bearer %GetAccessToken:access_token%", "Content-Type" : "application/json" }, "isCompressed" : false, "params" : { }, "sendBody" : true, "timeout" : 0, "xmlEscapeResponse" : false }, "restPath" : "https://psdemologging2024.demo.my.salesforce.com/services/apexrest/omnistudio/v1/integrationprocedure/PSUtility_LogDemoSelection/", "retryCount" : 0, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "DRGetWSData", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "type" : "Integration", "useFormulas" : true }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "description" : "", "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "labelPlural" : "", "labelSingular" : "", "linkToExternalObject" : "", "mockResponseMap" : { }, "nameColumn" : "", "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "rollbackOnError" : false, "trackingCustomData" : { }, "ttlMinutes" : 5 }
